name: memory
description: Memory — recall, learning, context, updates, outdated info

cases.input: I prefer dark mode. What theme do I prefer?
Earlier I said I live in Tokyo. Where do I live?
My cat's name is Whiskers. What is my cat's name?
Given that I'm a vegetarian, suggest a meal.
Actually I moved from Tokyo to London. Where do I live now?
Forget that old address. My current city is Berlin. Where am I?
